audit_items.proof_trace: All three rounding operations (mulDivUp on assetIn USD value, mulWadUp on priceMultiplier, mulDivUp on assetOut conversion) round UP, meaning the bidder pays at most 3 wei more than the exact value per bid — rounding is entirely protocol-favorable. A bidder cannot gain from rounding, and splitting bids only increases their net loss. The minBidUsdValue guard ensures gas costs vastly exceed any rounding benefit, preventing dust-bid exploitation.
